settings.heading: We Recommend
settings.body:
• Clean with a soft, dry cloth.
  • Avoid prolonged exposure to direct sunlight.
  • Keep away from excessive moisture.
  • Do not use abrasive cleaners or harsh chemicals.
  • Store products in a cool, dry environment when not in use.

Always follow any specific care instructions provided with your product.

settings.heading: Product Care
settings.intro: Proper care helps preserve the quality and appearance of your purchase.
